{
  "questions": [
    {
      "question": "What is the primary function of a database management system?",
      "options": ["A) To store and manage data", "B) To provide user interface", "C) To perform data analysis", "D) To develop database design"],
      "correct": 0,
      "explanation": "A database management system is designed to capture, store, manage, and retrieve data. It provides a way to store and manage data in a structured format, making it easier to access and analyze the data."
